title: Thai-Style Semolina Pudding with Croation Pilaf Crunch
description: A unique Thai dessert featuring semolina pudding and a crunchy pilaf topping, combining traditional Thai flavors with international flair.
instructions: 1. In a medium saucepan, combine semolina and water. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
2. Remove from heat and stir in dissolved jelly.
3. Transfer the pudding mixture to individual serving cups.
4. Top each serving with crushed Croatian Pilaf.
5. Garnish with a sprinkle of bitter, if desired.
